events.title: build Pulsefeed v0.1: relay + worker + CLI
scaffold + crypto + queue green
events.body: 25 tests passing across HMAC verify, replay protection, dedupe, queue helpers.

events.title: receiver boots, smoke test passes
events.body: Valid POST -> 202 + row. Replay -> 200 deduped. Bad sig -> 401. All paths verified against a live server.

events.title: worker dispatching end-to-end
events.body: Worker claims a pending row, calls relay.dispatch(), marks delivered. 43 tests total now.

events.title: systemd + internal VPN route live
events.body: Receiver + worker supervised via systemd, /hooks/* routed over the internal VPN. Survived a reboot.

events.title: Pulsefeed v0.1 complete, 43 tests, deployed
events.body: Main -> chat round-trip proven. Repo: meridian-loom/pulsefeed@a1b2c3d.

events.title: autonomous: retrain widget-demand forecast on synthetic catalog exports
raw data ingested: 1.2M rows, 8.4GB
events.body: Source: synthetic catalog exports. Deduped to 980k unique. Schema validation passed.

events.title: still working: feature engineering
events.body: Extracting catalog embeddings and seasonal demand indexes.

events.title: feature engineering complete
events.body: 42 features extracted, including catalog embeddings (FastText) and seasonal demand indexes.

events.title: still working: hyperparameter sweep (run 4/12)
events.body: XGBoost grid over depth, learning_rate, subsample. ~18 min/run remaining.

events.title: still working: hyperparameter sweep (run 8/12)
events.body: On track. Best so far: MAE 14.2 on validation.

events.title: sweep complete, best model selected
events.body: Final: depth=8, lr=0.05, subsample=0.8. Val MAE 11.8 (-23% vs prior model).

events.title: still working: backtest on held-out data
events.body: Replaying 6 months of held-out demand.

events.title: backtest on 6 months held-out data
events.body: Calibration ECE 0.04, no drift detected vs training. Safe to ship.

events.title: model deployed to staging, smoke predictions look correct
events.body: 5 spot-check items, predictions within tolerance of recent comparable demand.

events.title: still working: production cutover
events.body: Promoting the model and warming the rollback path.

events.title: widget-demand forecast v2 live, 23% MAE improvement
events.body: Production cutover complete. Old model kept warm for rollback. Postmortem drafted.

events.title: migration tested against staging snapshot
events.body: 22 tier rows updated, no orphaned FKs. Rollback script verified.

events.title: need finance sign-off on plan-B reclassification
events.body: Migration reclassifies 12 synthetic accounts from plan A to plan B, which affects their next invoice. Need finance to confirm the reclassification is intended before applying.

events.title: finance signed off, resuming
events.body: Confirmed with Robin Avery: plan B is correct; send the reclassification notice after the migration completes.

events.title: migration applied to prod, 22 rows updated
events.body: Apply duration 4.2s. No errors. Health checks green.

events.title: migration complete + reclassification notices sent
events.body: 22 rows migrated, 12 plan-B accounts notified. Rollback script archived.

events.title: investigate: nightly ETL job failing intermittently
still working: bisecting the failure
events.body: Reproducing locally with production-sized batches.

events.title: reproduced failure on staging
events.body: Triggered on every run with batch size >2.4M. Connection reset from the upstream warehouse.

events.title: still working: tracing the reset
events.body: Correlating the reset with warehouse query duration.

events.title: root cause identified: warehouse query timeout
events.body: Query hits a 5-min server-side limit when the partition exceeds 2.4M rows. Needs a warehouse-side config change.

events.title: warehouse config change requires the data-platform team
events.body: Need the data-platform team to raise statement_timeout for the analytics role. Filed MERI-2207; expected response 2-3 business days. Closing this arc as terminal-blocked; will open a new arc when MERI-2207 lands.
